description.en: Like built-in bin(), except negative values are represented in two’s complement, and the leading bit always indicates sign (0 implies positive, 1 implies negative). >>> import enum >>> enum.bin(10) '0b0 1010' >>> enum.bin(~10) # ~10 is -11 '0b1 0101' Added in version 3.11.

excerpt.es: Like built-in bin(), except negative values are represented in two’s complement, and the leading bit always indicates sign (0 implies positive, 1 implies negative). >>> import enum >>> enum.bin(10) '0...
